NAME: SARIF export validates against the SARIF 2.1.0 schema
an admin session can perform an admin-only operation
an isolated single-rule IP is not correlated
a failing job does not poison the pool
the O'Brien search is not flagged as SQL injection
SARIF export never leaks a raw secret from evidence
excess submissions are rejected with backpressure
a weak password is rejected at account creation
a locked account is rejected even with the correct password
a queued job can be cancelled before it runs
an analyst session cannot perform an admin-only operation
ssh brute force followed by success is detected as critical
the benign sudo command is not flagged
the web+ssh brute force attack is correlated
CSV export contains one row per finding
